hero.tagline:
Tennis, as it should
be taught.
hero.subline: Premier tennis in Laguna Beach — from first swings to college pathway. Free trial.

founder.headline: Founded in Laguna Beach by Andrew Mateljan
founder.subhead: A lifetime in the game — from international courts to California's coast.
founder.body: 25 years in tennis as a top-ranked junior and international coach. Years spent coaching in Spain and Croatia shaped a movement-first approach grounded in clarity and accountability. Now guiding players of every level toward their best version of the game.
founder.quote: Structure creates confidence. Confidence creates results.

results.headline: Guided by structure, repetition, and trust.

slides.subline: Karue Sell, ATP #262 — from the #800s to a career high earned through structured work on tour.
slides.imageAlt: Karue Sell competing on a tennis court

slides.subline: Ryan Seggerman — career-high ATP singles #72; movement work at LBTA between tour stops.
slides.imageAlt: Ryan Seggerman on a blue hard court

slides.subline: Henry Mateljan — age 9, 4.6 UTR; Little Mo recognition on his junior journey.
slides.imageAlt: Junior player at a tournament tennis court

slides.subline: Olov — 4.0 to 5.0 USTA; strong results in 5.0 play and national-level events.
slides.imageAlt: Olov competing at a USTA national-level tennis event

whyChoose.headline: Why Choose Laguna Beach Tennis Academy
whyChoose.subline: Coaching that starts with movement, adds clear structure, and grows beside people who take the work seriously.
